name: blackraptor-ai
description: Governed AI agent teams for Claude Code — a full development team and a 12-seat executive advisory council, with shared skills (Excellence Pass, research-integrity, gate reviews). Install the suite, or either team.

plugins.name: blackraptor-dev-team
plugins.description: 23 governed dev-team agents (process orchestrator, principal architect, engineers, and blocking-gate reviewers incl. security, privacy, compliance, red-team, and the evidence-auditor research gate) + shared skills: excellence-pass, research-integrity, gate-verdict-format, enforcement-liveness, change-record, stride-review, owasp-llm-checklist, expand-contract-migration.

plugins.name: blackraptor-council
plugins.description: A 12-seat executive advisory council convened through a challenge protocol — product-strategy, gtm-strategy, pricing-strategy, finance, market-insight, ethics-governance, revenue, people-org, and more, coordinated by the council-orchestrator.
